templates.name: Remove Web Limits
templates.description: Removes website restrictions that block copying, cutting, selecting text, and right-click context menus. Restores normal browser behavior on pages that disable these actions.
templates.author: Browser Automata

scripts.name: Remove Web Limits Script
scripts.description: Intercepts and neutralizes event listeners that prevent copy, cut, paste, select, and right-click. Removes inline event handlers and CSS restrictions.

cssRules.name: Remove Web Limits CSS
